question_text: Pick out the incorrect statement: {tex}\mathrm{MnO}_{4}^{2-}{/tex} is quite strongly oxidizing and stable only in very strong alkalies. In dilute alkali, neutral solutions, it disproportionates. In acidic solutions, {tex}\mathrm{MnO}_{4}^{-}{/tex} is reduced to Mn 2+ and thus, KMnO 4 is widely used as oxidising agent. KMnO 4 does not act as oxidising agent in alkaline medium.
